subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the servant unto her who hath believed in God and hath been among the devout ones within the Pavilion of Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من العبد الی التی آمنت بالله و کانت من القانتات فی سرادق القدس مقنوعا
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
